meaning: v.复原,逆行,使倒退n.退回,回归,归复权
examples: At the moment of victory, we regress.
Normally, they regress into four to five fused vertebrae (the coccyx).
Some even regress and do not need to be treated - they are harmless.
But going back to diffuse non-dense agrarian sources for energy is to regress , not progress.
They also commonly occur during the early stages of pregnancy and can regress after pregnancy.
